data.title: 13th Annual Globee® Awards for Leadership open for global entries; recognizing achievements worldwide.
data.description: Acknowledging leadership in all areas: The 13th Annual Globee® Awards for Leadership is now accepting submissions from across the globe. The prestigious awards program, known for its data-driven approach, is based in San Francisco. Entries are open for professionals and organizations internationally to showcase their leadership achievements.

data.title: Pacaso expands Mexico offerings with co-ownership in Punta de Mita, Riviera Maya, and Mexico City. Luxury options for US buyers. (Characters: 122)
data.description: Expanding from its initial triumph in Los Cabos, Pacaso introduces additional fully furnished luxury second home choices to American buyers in various top-tier Mexican resort and city centers. On July 17, 2025, in San Francisco, Pacaso, known for its innovative platform facilitating shared ownership of upscale vacation properties, revealed their new offerings.

data.title: July 17, 2025 - Travelzoo announces $299 Napa retreat offer with $164 in perks for club members in US.
data.description: Travelzoo® has recently unveiled its Club Offers for Club Members in the U.S, catering to travel enthusiasts. The deals have been carefully vetted and negotiated, offering a Napa Retreat with an upgrade and $164 worth of perks for a price of $299. This exclusive offer provides members with the opportunity to enjoy a special getaway at a discounted rate.

data.title: Chantecaille, luxury skincare brand, expands to India in collab with Luxasia, leading beauty distributor in Asia - July 17, 2025.
data.description: Luxury botanical skincare and cosmetics brand, Chantecaille, has revealed plans to enter the Indian market in partnership with Luxasia, a prominent beauty distributor in Asia. The brand, founded by Sylvie Chantecaille, is recognized worldwide for its high-end products. The move signifies a significant expansion for Chantecaille, bringing its sought-after offerings to a new demographic in India. Luxasia's extensive reach across the region will play a key role in introducing Chantecaille to Indian consumers. This strategic collaboration aims to capitalize on the growing beauty industry in India, projected to reach a value of $XX billion by 2025. Stay tuned for Chantecaille's debut in India as beauty enthusiasts await the launch with great anticipation.

data.title: Oroco's subsidiary to acquire Vainilla Mineral Concession in Mexico's Sinaloa; 100% interest through option agreement.
data.description: In Vancouver, Canada on July 17, 2025, Oroco Resource Corp. (TSX-V: OCO) shared that its Mexican subsidiary, Minera Xochipala, S.A. de C.V. (“Xochipala”), sealed a deal with Aztec Zinc de Mexico, S.A. de C.V. (“Aztec Zinc”) to secure a 100% stake in the Vainilla Mineral Concession situated in the Choix District of northern Sinaloa, Mexico. This acquisition was made through an option agreement.

data.title: CPSC announces recalls with Tractor Supply for Traveller Aluminum Loading Ramps due to fall hazard. View at www.cpsc.gov.
data.description: Today, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) revealed multiple recalls in collaboration with various firms. Tractor Supply is recalling Traveller Aluminum Loading Ramps (Recall number: 25-387) due to a fall hazard. For more information on these and other recalls, visit the CPSC website at www.cpsc.gov.

data.title: CPSC warns consumers to stop using Mad Rabbit "RELIEVE" Lidocaine Numbing Cream immediately due to safety risk. Visit www.cpsc.gov for more info.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, the Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC) issued a warning urging consumers to cease using the Mad Rabbit "RELIEVE" Lidocaine Numbing Cream immediately due to safety concerns. Information regarding product safety warnings and recalls can be found online at www.cpsc.gov. It is crucial for consumers to take note of such warnings to prevent potential risks associated with the product.

US Treasury: 'Today, the Department of the Treasury’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctioned Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores (a.k.a. “Niño Guerrero”)—the head of Tren de Aragua—and five other key Tren de Aragua leaders and affiliates.'

data.title: Trend Micro recognized 20 times as leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant Endpoint Protection Platforms, surpassing threats.
data.description: Trend Micro Incorporated, a global cybersecurity leader, has been acknowledged as a Leader for the 20th consecutive time in threat intelligence and security capabilities. The recognition was made public on July 17, 2025. Trend Micro's stock is listed as TYO: 4704 on the Tokyo Stock Exchange and TSE: 4704.

data.title: Trump pushing for nuclear energy revival, aims to quadruple US nuclear capacity to 400 GW by 2050 through DOE initiatives.
data.description: President Trump has called for a major push in nuclear energy, urging the Department of Energy to revamp the industry through executive orders and new initiatives. The administration aims to increase U.S. nuclear generating capacity to 400 GW by 2050, a fourfold increase from current levels, and to bolster the domestic nuclear fuel cycle. The DOE's responsibilities include expediting the construction of advanced reactors, such as those for the Department of Defense and critical AI data centers essential for national security. For more information, visit Benzinga.com.
Vinci Autoroutes, Eiffage, SFTRF, and ATMB are in exclusive talks with Brisa to sell all shares of Axxès.
Vinci Announces 6.7% Rise in Traffic for Second Quarter 2024 & June Airport Data, Including 5.1% Increase in Passenger Traffic and 6.5% Growth in Commercial Movements
Atlanta Fed GDPNow Index Falls to 2.39% From 2.58%

data.title: Corvias Foundation awards $50,000 scholarships to children of employees; helped 500 military families with $20M since 2006.
data.description: In Warwick, Rhode Island, Corvias Foundation remains dedicated to fostering educational opportunities and supporting the well-being of its employees. Established in 2006, the Foundation has assisted over 500 military-connected families by awarding scholarships totaling over $20 million. The current recipients, selected for their outstanding academic performance, leadership qualities, and active involvement in their school environments, are equipped to succeed in higher education. The Foundation's commitment to supporting these scholars and their families remains steadfast.

data.title: BLOCKv creates BLOCKv Foundation in Switzerland for Web3 OS, supporting open development; aims to advance programmable tokens.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Zug, Switzerland, BLOCKv introduced the BLOCKv Foundation, a non-profit organization based in Switzerland. BLOCKv is known for its Web3 OS that allows enterprises and developers to build scalable digital experiences. The foundation is committed to furthering the development of programmable tokens.

data.title: Exactech appoints Richard J. Friedman, MD, FRCSC, as Chief Medical Officer to guide growth and innovation.
data.description: A highly skilled surgeon, Richard J. Friedman, MD, FRCSC, has been appointed as the Chief of Exactech, a leading global medical technology company based in Gainesville, Florida. The decision came on July 17, 2025, marking a significant step for the company as it aims to steer towards future expansion and innovation. Dr. Friedman's extensive experience will be instrumental in providing versatile insights and guidance across various functions within the company. His expertise will play a crucial role in driving growth and fostering a culture of creativity within Exactech.
BoE testing scenarios include the US dollar swap market drying up, according to a source.
VINCI Airports reports an increase in traffic by 8.5%, reaching a total of 210 million passengers as of June 30, 2025.

data.title: Josephinum Academy secures landmark partnership with Pulte Family Charitable Foundation, ensuring future growth.
data.description: In Chicago on July 17, 2025, Josephinum Academy of the Sacred Heart has reached a noteworthy point in its history. This achievement is made possible by the dedicated backing from its donors and a pivotal collaboration with the Pulte Family Charitable Foundation's Catholic Initiative.

data.title: Semiconductor plating market to reach $1.73B by 2031 due to 5G and AI growth. Segments: Copper, Gold plating solutions.
data.description: In Bangalore, India, on July 17, 2025, a report on the Semiconductor Plating Chemicals Market was released. The market is divided into types such as Copper Plating Solution, Gold Plating Solution, and others, with key applications in Semiconductor Package and Semiconductor Manufacturing sectors. This study offers a Global Opportunity Analysis and Industry Forecast for this market segment. The report provides insights into the growing market, highlighting key segments and potential growth opportunities for stakeholders.
